name: forgemaster
description: Top-level orchestrator that drives one rough idea through intake, adversarial hardening, spec, tests-first build via subagents, and enforced quality gates to a shipped, verified deliverable, coordinating the marketplace's other skills end to end. The run manifest is written only by a tested Node gate ledger that demands an evidence file per gate; hooks block hand-edits to run.json, block abandoning a run mid-gates, and surface unfinished runs at session start.
